message.content:
Indianapolis morning weather (Thu, April 2, 2026):

Conditions: Partly cloudy

Temperature: ~45–50°F (7–10°C) early morning

Trend: Warming to around ~60°F (16°C) later today

Wind: Light to moderate breeze

Practical note: No major hazards this morning—good for commute. Keep a light jacket; temps are cool early but improve by midday.
